title: Red's Stormbreaker
description: A Mod which adds MCU Stormbreaker in Minecraft
body:
Hi There. It's me again with probably the Coolest Mod of all I have made so far.                                   
**Red's Stormbreaker**                                                                                               
This Mod adds the Stormbreaker from Marvel Cinematic Universe. So the Full Credit and Ownership of it goes to Marvel. I don't OWN the idea of Stormbreaker.                                         


So This Mod adds the Stormbreaker and 3 New Enchantments.                                             


**See the Gallery Tab for all of the Images**


It is craftable weapon. It has 20 Attack Damage and 1 Attack Speed.                                     
Now The Weapon is a little expensive but trust me it will be worth it

**Its Recipe also given in the Gallery Tab.**                                                        

As of the Enchantments, They are "Thunder Jumper" and the Second one is "Thunder Strike" and now the Third one is "Thunder Guard".               
I will make a better and detailed video on it later too.
